title: harry0703/MoneyPrinterTurbo
summary: An AI-powered short-video generation project that can create scripts, gather materials, generate subtitles and voice narration, add music, and produce HD vertical or horizontal videos from a topic or keyword.
friendlySummary: MoneyPrinterTurbo can generate short videos by making scripts, gathering materials, creating subtitles and voice, adding music, and rendering videos.
whyItMatters: Creators and small teams can use it to prototype repeatable video-production pipelines. It is also a practical reference for stitching LLMs, TTS, subtitles, stock media, and rendering into one workflow.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Creators and small teams can use it as a reference for repeatable AI video-production pipelines.
